info.title: dkgen
info.description: dotnet global tool used to generate draftkings lineups

options.name: --include-questionable
options.description: [default=false] Includes draftables with a questionable status.

options.name: --include-base-salary
options.description: [default=false] Includes draftables with the base salary (lowest possible).

options.name: --min-fppg
options.description: (Classic Only) [default=10.0] Minimum fantasy points per game (per player - excluding defense & kickers). [default: 10.0]

options.name: --exclude-defense
options.description: (Showdown Only) [default: false] Excludes DST positions from lineups.

options.name: --exclude-kickers
options.description: (Showdown Only) [default=false] Excludes Kicker positions from lineups.

options.name: --output-format
options.description: [default=text] The console output format. One of (json | text) [default: text]

options.name: --lineup-count
options.description: [default=5] The number of lineups to output for each generator (max is 100). [default: 5]

options.name: --give-me
options.description: The names of players to include in generated lineups (comma delimited)

options.name: --exclude-player
options.description: The names of players to exclude in generated lineups (comma delimited)

options.name: --give-me-captain
options.description: (Showdown Only) The names of captain players to include in generated lineups (comma delimited)

options.name: --exclude-captain
options.description: (Showdown Only) The names of captain players to exclude in generated lineups (comma delimited)
